'''The Aviary''' was a place on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] near the [[Museum of the Old Republic]]. [[Ban Papeega]] tried to hide in there from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The Sith Lord found Papeega and killed him. Afterwards he burned the building down and killed the [[Songbird/Legends|songbirds]], to prevent them from repeating the name "[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Skywalker]]."<ref name="Vader's Quest 1" />

==Appearances==
*[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]]
